methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series B → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.9x) to $60M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 6 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Chips & Semiconductors. Range: $500M - $5.0B.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Semiconductors P/S median is 20.6x across 3 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

private.name: Positron AI
private.rationale: Same sector (Chips & Semiconductors), same stage (Series B), post-money $1B+

data.narrative:
Atom Computing is a Series B stage semiconductor company that has raised $60M to date. The valuation assessment draws on a peer universe of 8 private and 3 public comparables in the Chips & Semiconductors sector, including stage-adjacent companies like Positron AI, Etched, d-Matrix, and Substrate.

Two valuation methods are applicable. Stage-progression analysis applies a 1.9x step-up multiplier typical for Series B advancement to the $60M raised proxy, implying a valuation of $114M. Peer-median analysis across six same-sector, same/adjacent-stage private companies yields a median valuation of $1.0B, with a range of $500M to $5.0B. The peer cohort spans Positron AI and Substrate at $1.0B, d-Matrix at $2.0B, Etched at $5.0B, and DEEPX at $529M. Public-comp anchoring via price-to-sales multiples (median 20.6x across ALAB, NVDA, AMD) cannot be applied due to absence of target revenue disclosure.

The two applicable methods produce a wide range reflective of stage and sector maturity dispersion. The triangulated valuation band is $97M (low) to $1.1B (high), with a median of $557M. Key uncertainties include the target's revenue run-rate and capital intensity trajectory relative to peers, which would narrow positioning within the range. The upper bound reflects elevated frontier-chip sector multiples; the lower bound anchors to near-term funding stage mechanics.
